productName: Stone City Infused Pre-Roll 2 Pack - Lemon Cherry Gelato - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Lemon Cherry Gelato flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and berry, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
